summary: The Fury Tribe and Beastmen are engaged in a fierce battle with the Warriors of Ambush. The Tiger King, Yul, is leading the fight, but he is injured and collapses. His allies come to his aid, and they manage to fend off the enemy attack. Meanwhile, a mysterious figure, Ralph, is being saved by someone named Edoke.
key_moments: The Fury Tribe and Beastmen launch an ambush on the Warriors of Ambush
Tiger King Yul is injured and collapses in battle
